natural_strengths: Cross-domain insight that no specialist could produce
Visual thinking that makes complex systems intuitive
Direct observation that reveals what theory misses
Biomimetic design inspired by natural systems
Prototype experimentation that pushes technical boundaries
natural_weaknesses: Chronic inability to finish projects once the interesting problems are solved
Breadth can prevent the depth needed for practical execution
Tendency to pursue fascinating tangents at the expense of deadlines
May overvalue novelty when proven methods would serve better
communication_style: Thinks in sketches and diagrams. Will pull in analogies from unexpected domains. Explains through visual models rather than written arguments. May wander into fascinating but tangential observations.
